title: About
subtitle: Nice to meet you.
firstParagraph: Since i start my job as software developer about 3 years ago, I've worked on different projects like web pages or mobile applications and some consultancies for small companies.
secondParagraph: I'm constantly working to improve my skills and offer quality work, fast and fully adapted to your needs.

thirdParagraph.first: Do you have any idea? Would you like to start in the digital transformation? Do you want to know more about my skills?
thirdParagraph.second: I'll be ready to help you.
